session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
Total comments: 7 review threads + 1 discussion comment Actionable (code changes): 7 Batches: 1 Commits: 1 (`47b2a70`)
All review threads resolved. Discussion comment replied to.
**Changes made:** - Replaced 4 verbatim source code blocks with source pointers (worktree-dispatch-detection.md, external-docs-path.md, tui/architecture.md) - Corrected inaccurate source file reference (`dispatch_cmd.py` → ABC method in `erk_shared`) - Replaced line number reference with name-based identifier in job-ordering-strategy.md - Corrected TOML paths from `erk/data/codex/skills/` to `erk/data/claude/skills/` in artifact-distribution-sync.md
**Next steps:** 1. Push changes: - **Graphite repos**: `gt submit` (or `gt ss`) - **Plain git repos**: `git push` - If push is rejected (non-fast-forward): Run `/erk:reconcile-with-remote` to resolve. Do NOT use `git pull --rebase`. 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
